revision.text:
{{mbox |image=[[File:Logo wikibot.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] |text='''This {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}} {{#if:{{yesno|{{{subcats|}}}}}| and subcategories are | is }} used by one or more [[Wikipedia:Bots|bots]] in their standard operation.'''
Any [[Template:Bot use warning#Breaking changes|breaking changes]] to this {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}}, including moving it or nominating it for deletion, '''must be communicated in advance to the bot operator(s)'''. {{#if:{{{bot|{{{bots|}}}}}}|
The relevant bots are: {{{bot|{{{bots}}}}}}.}}}}{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]]}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
revision.text:
{{mbox |image=[[File:Logo wikibot.svg|50px|link=|alt=]] |text='''This {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}} {{#if:{{yesno|{{{subcats|}}}}}| and subcategories are | is }} used by one or more [[Wikipedia:Bots|bots]] in their standard operation.'''

The relevant bots are: {{{bot|{{{bots}}}}}}.}}}}{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]]}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

The relevant bots are: {{{bot|{{{bots}}}}}}.}}}}{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]]}} {{documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Accessibility: Remove "aria-hidden" from the icon, because focusable elements should not be hidden from the accessibility tree. (Also, use ''' bolding instead of manual "font-weight: bold" bolding)
revision.text:
{{mbox |image= [[File:Logo wikibot.svg|50px|alt=icon]] |textstyle= |title= |text='''This {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}} {{#if:{{yesno|{{{subcats|}}}}}| and subcategories are | is }} used by one or more [[Wikipedia:Bots|bots]].'''
If you intend to change this {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}} in any significant way, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please inform the bot operators. Thank you. {{#if:{{{bot|{{{bots|}}}}}}|The relevant bots are: {{{bot|{{{bots}}}}}}}}}}{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]]}} {{documentation}}

{{mbox |image= [[File:Logo wikibot.svg|50px|alt=icon]] |textstyle= |title= |text='''This {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}} {{#if:{{yesno|{{{subcats|}}}}}| and subcategories are | is }} used by one or more [[Wikipedia:Bots|bots]].'''
If you intend to change this {{{namespace|{{pagetype|defaultns=extended}}}}} in any significant way, move it, or nominate it for deletion, please inform the bot operators. Thank you. {{#if:{{{bot|{{{bots|}}}}}}|The relevant bots are: {{{bot|{{{bots}}}}}}}}}}{{Sandbox other||[[Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]]}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bot_use_warning here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
